meaning: n.不名誉vt.玷辱,使蒙羞n.[商] 拒付,不兑现
examples: You are a dishonor to our regiment.
To stall in the air is for them disgrace and it is dishonor.
'or I may become poor and steal, and so dishonor the name of my God.
But if we pull out in haste and frustration, we will dishonor those dead.
"I will not dishonor the nation I love, or myself, by letting ambition overcome principle, " he said.
